untranslatable_reason: Signal requires undefined parameters: (1) 'definition_of_new_high' marked AUTHOR_SILENT — cannot determine exact price level or lookback period for new high detection; (2) 'definition_of_long_quiet_period' marked AUTHOR_SILENT — cannot quantify duration or volatility threshold; (3) 'momentum_calculation_method' marked AUTHOR_SILENT — no specific momentum indicator specified (could be RSI, MACD, rate-of-change, or custom). Constructed best-guess conditions using Donchian breakout (new high proxy) + low ATR (quiet period proxy), but these are interpretive substitutes.
translation_notes: Used close > dc_upper to approximate 'new high' (breakout above recent range). Used atr_14 < atr_20 to approximate 'long quiet period' (recent volatility lower than medium-term average). Exit condition uses close < sma_20 as a fast reversal signal matching 'exit fast' requirement. Hold_days_max set to 5 to reflect 'fast entry, fast exit' philosophy. Target regime set to TRENDING_UP per signal category TREND and direction LONG.
